description: Perform quantitative microstructural analysis on the pre-loaded AuPbSn40 BSE-SEM micrograph. Calibrate the image at 0.49 µm/pixel. Isolate and segment the bright gold-rich phase, separating touching particles and excluding noise smaller than 1 µm². Measure the Area, Perimeter, Circularity, Feret's Diameter, and Solidity for each particle. Save the individual measurements to ~/Fiji_Data/results/sem_analysis/particle_measurements.csv and a segmentation overlay to ~/Fiji_Data/results/sem_analysis/segmentation_overlay.png. Generate a summary report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/sem_analysis/phase_summary.txt including total particle count, phase area fraction (%), mean particle area (µm²), and mean Feret diameter (µm).
